canonical_operators.language: put the frying pan on top of the cabinet

operators.name: PickUp
operators.description: pick up the frying pan from the stove

operators.name: Place
operators.description: place the frying pan on top of the cabinet

The robot moves the frying pan it is holding and places it on top of the cabinet.
